features: QUALITY WOODEN 7x5 PICTURE FRAMES: This 7x5 Frame is perfect for displaying your treasured photos, prints, poster or other art work. Easy to fit into, and simple to hang on a wall. 7x5 inch Frame made from REAL WOOD and with REAL GLASS

LONG LASTING MATERIALS: These 5x7 White Frames are made by skilled picture framers using solid wood and REAL GLASS for optimal viewing of your pictures. This 5x7 Inch Frame size has a classic contemporary look which will look great in any home or office.

IDEAL FOR ANY OCCASION: Our 7 x 5 White Frame is a great way to store and display your memories, achievements or favourite artwork. You can add an eye-catching display in your home or office, where this 7x5 Photo Frame will enhance your chosen decor whether for in your own home or as a gift for a chosen loved one. It can also stand on a sidetable or mantlepiece thanks to it's built in stand

LANDSCAPE or PORTRAIT DISPLAY: This White 5x7 Frame can hang or stand either vertically (portrait) or horizontally (landscape) thanks to it's built in hangers already attached to the back. White Photo Frame 5x7 inches (or 178 mm x 127 mm in metric)

MADE IN THE UK: These White 7 x 5 Frames are made in the UK by one of our skilled picture framers. As members of the Fine Art Trade Guild we hold ourselves to high standards and each and every picture frame 7 x 5 inches is meticulously checked and inspected after being made.
We are a leading UK Manufactuer of Real Wooden Picture Frames - CHECK OUT OUR FANTASTIC AMAZON REVIEWS! Buy 5x7 Picture Frames from the UK's most trusted picture frame manufacturer!
description: Looking for High Quality 7x5 White Frames? Ideal for photographers, artists, or for use within your home this beautiful wooden 5x7 Photo Frame will enhance your artwork or photography whilst complimenting a wide range of décor. Handcrafted: Made from high-quality wooden moulding, expertly crafted by real picture framers. These White 7x5 Frames provide a timeless look that will look excellent in homes of all styles. Fitted with 2mm float glass giving excellent clarity which will display your artwork or photography in its very best light without scratching or fading like cheap perspex often does. Your photographs or prints will fit perfectly within this frame and can hang in either a portrait or landscape position as each frame is supplied complete with integrated hanging fixings. These White 7 x 5 Frames can easily be hung on the wall in both ways (vertical or horizontal). Either way, it serves as a wonderful focal point in any room. Frame Sizes 10" x 8" and below also come with a stand enabling the frame to stand on a sideboard or mantlepiece (again either portrait or landscape). Accuracy Guaranteed: The internal measurements on this photo frame will fit a photo or print (or mount) that measures precisely 7 x 5 Inch Frame Durable: Unlike plastic or MDF photo frames, the combination of real wood and glass offers a professional finish while also being more durable, meaning our frames will stand the test of time.
